login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your veterinary clinic.

forgot_password.title: Recover password
forgot_password.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to create a new password.

reset_password.title: Create new password
reset_password.subtitle: Choose a strong password for your account.

verify_email.title: Verify your email
verify_email.subtitle: We've sent a verification link to your email address.

two_factor.title: Two-step verification
two_factor.subtitle: Enter the code from your authenticator app.

confirm_password.title: Confirm your password
confirm_password.subtitle: This is a secure area. Please confirm your password to continue.

change_password.title: Change your password
change_password.intro: For security, please set a personal password for your account at {{brand}} before continuing.
